description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, NO_INTERACTION=1, REPORT_EXIT_STATUS=1 variables and defines a global before_script that runs apt-get update, installs lcov and valgrind, downloads phpunit.phar to /usr/local/bin/phpunit and makes it executable, and a global after_script that runs ./run-tests.sh after_failure. Add a job named test:5.6-nts using the jbboehr/php-cgi:5.6-nts image in the default test stage that runs ./run-tests.sh userland. Add a job named test:5.6-zts using the jbboehr/php-cgi:5.6-zts image that runs ./run-tests.sh userland. Add jobs test:7.0-nts and test:7.0-zts using jbboehr/php-cgi:7.0-nts and jbboehr/php-cgi:7.0-zts images respectively, each executing ./run-tests.sh userland, then ./run-tests.sh coverage, then ./run-tests.sh valgrind. Add jobs test:7.1-nts and test:7.1-zts (both using the 7.0 images as defined) that also run ./run-tests.sh userland, ./run-tests.sh coverage, and ./run-tests.sh valgrind in the default test stage.
